texts.label: text
texts.orig: **Infectious Disease Reporting Procedure for the 113th Academic Year Kindergarten**
texts.text: **Infectious Disease Reporting Procedure for the 113th Academic Year Kindergarten**

texts.label: text
texts.orig: **Student falls ill**
texts.text: **Student falls ill**

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:
Suggested Reportable Symptoms:
＊ Fever
＊ Cough
＊ Diarrhea
＊ Vomiting
＊ Rash
＊ Blisters
＊ Headache
＊ Sore throat
texts.text:
Suggested Reportable Symptoms:
＊ Fever
＊ Cough
＊ Diarrhea
＊ Vomiting
＊ Rash
＊ Blisters
＊ Headache
＊ Sore throat

texts.label: text
texts.orig:
If a caregiver suspects that within one week, a fifth of the class (for classes with more than 15 students) or more than three students (for classes with 15 or fewer students)
show the same suggested reportable symptoms
texts.text:
If a caregiver suspects that within one week, a fifth of the class (for classes with more than 15 students) or more than three students (for classes with 15 or fewer students)
show the same suggested reportable symptoms

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Yes
texts.text: Yes

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: A report must be submitted within 24 hours via the Ministry of Education’s Campus Safety and Disaster Prevention Information Network.
texts.text: A report must be submitted within 24 hours via the Ministry of Education’s Campus Safety and Disaster Prevention Information Network.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: A report must also be submitted within 48 hours through Chiayi County’s School Suspected Infectious Disease Reporting System.
texts.text: A report must also be submitted within 48 hours through Chiayi County’s School Suspected Infectious Disease Reporting System.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: **Health Bureau:**
texts.text: **Health Bureau:**

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Upon receiving a report from the kindergarten, conduct a preliminary assessment of the case, and depending on the situation and type of illness, carry out an epidemiological investigation and report to the Centers for Disease Control.
texts.text: Upon receiving a report from the kindergarten, conduct a preliminary assessment of the case, and depending on the situation and type of illness, carry out an epidemiological investigation and report to the Centers for Disease Control.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: If necessary, provide health education and important reminders at the kindergarten, or notify the individual to undergo specimen collection.
texts.text: If necessary, provide health education and important reminders at the kindergarten, or notify the individual to undergo specimen collection.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Implement appropriate epidemic prevention measures in accordance with the Communicable Disease Control Act.
texts.text: Implement appropriate epidemic prevention measures in accordance with the Communicable Disease Control Act.

texts.label: text
texts.orig:
Department of Education:
Collaborate with the Health Bureau in conducting epidemiological investigations and assist Health Bureau personnel in implementing necessary epidemic prevention measures at all school levels.
texts.text:
Department of Education:
Collaborate with the Health Bureau in conducting epidemiological investigations and assist Health Bureau personnel in implementing necessary epidemic prevention measures at all school levels.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Health Bureau will handle **reporting and specimen collection** .
texts.text: The Health Bureau will handle **reporting and specimen collection** .

texts.label: text
texts.orig: **Whether the epidemic has eased.**
texts.text: **Whether the epidemic has eased.**

texts.label: text
texts.orig: **Whether the test results are positive for a legally designated infectious disease.**
texts.text: **Whether the test results are positive for a legally designated infectious disease.**

texts.label: text
texts.orig: No
texts.text: No

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Yes
texts.text: Yes

texts.label: text
texts.orig: **Case closed.**
texts.text: **Case closed.**

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Health Bureau will carry out subsequent related epidemic prevention measures and follow-up, and will request assistance from the Centers for Disease Control if necessary.
texts.text: The Health Bureau will carry out subsequent related epidemic prevention measures and follow-up, and will request assistance from the Centers for Disease Control if necessary.
